misconceptionSummary: Students can evaluate nth-term rules but do not grasp that the rule links position directly to value.

visuals.ruleText: An nth-term rule maps position to term value
visuals.subText: Input the position number, output the term

steps.narration: An nth-term rule is a direct link from term position to term value.
That is why nth-term generation works differently from term-to-term generation.
Each position has its own direct output from the rule.

lines.text: You can jump straight to any term if you know its position

steps.narration: That makes nth-term rules powerful for large positions too.

visuals.expression: Nth term rules connect position and value directly
visuals.label: Use the position as the input

steps.narration: The conceptual key is direct mapping from n to the term.

misconceptionStrip.text: Common mistake: thinking nth-term generation still depends on earlier terms. It does not. The rule gives each term directly from its position.
misconceptionStrip.audioNarration: If you know n, the rule gives the term without needing the earlier terms.
